text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to resist the lure of the Japanese Derby,
Manhattan Cafe enters the race. Ultimately,
however, she fails to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race takes a toll on her body. Agnes Tachyon
and I end up nursing her back to health, sparing
no effort as we take care of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Managing to prevent Manhattan Cafe from
suffering any serious issues, we hold out hope for
the autumn season.
